text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has accomplished incredible
things during her first three years in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond! Have you decided on your next
race? There have been many rumors about you!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Will you be competing in the same race as
Kitasan Black? Or perhaps something else?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My next step is to move to the international
stage.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I plan to compete in races steeped in tradition
and prestige, and carve out a new chapter in
history for the Umamusume of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean you'll be heading to France?!
Please tell us about your plans in detail!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's announcement of her intention
to enter international races creates a stir of
excitement throughout Japan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her absolute confidence in victory and composed
demeanor has undoubtedly convinced many
people of her potential to reshape history.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Most encouraging! I'm expecting great things
from you and await reports of your success!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, ma'am! As a representative of
Umamusume across Japan, I'll run with pride and
dignity!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I promise to accomplish the cherished goal that
Japanese Umamusume have dreamed of for so
long!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Your travel arrangements are complete. I'll email
you the details, so make sure you both check
them carefully.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Take care and have a safe trip.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's almost time for us to depart, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Why do you look so conflicted? Aren't you
happy?
choice_data_list: I was just thinking about how quickly time flies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond decided to embark on her
expedition to France immediately after
completing her first three years of the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following that, preparation for her the
international debut progressed smoothly. I can't
believe that we're already leaving tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I was the one who decided to continue taking on
new challenges, so I can't afford to let up even a
little.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll aim for the top wherever I go, and carve a new
chapter in history for both the Satono family and
the Umamusume of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The more challenging the goal, the more
worthwhile it is to accomplish, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond speaks with great enthusiasm.
The moment she fulfills one dream, her
unwavering passion pushes her on to the next.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're leaving tomorrow, right? I won't see you
for a while, so I thought I'd come and wish you
safe travels!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Don't forget to get me an awesome souvenir!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sure to get you the very best souvenir
ever! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Teio, what manner of goodbye is that?!
And don't just agree with her, Satono.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not like we're never seeing each other
again. In fact, I'm really looking forward to racing
against Dia when she gets back!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: W-well, I suppose I'm of the same mind...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'd be honored to run against you. I hope
we get the chance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'll be waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I hope the history you'll write for the Satono
family will be a glorious one. As a member of the
Mejiro family, I eagerly look forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Have a safe trip.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Thank you both!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day, on the day of our departure...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Mother! Father! Sorry for keeping you waiting!

text_block_list.name: Dia's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness! You're finally here! What took
you so long? You had me worried.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text: Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Not exactly... I was having trouble fitting
everything into my suitcase.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Mother
text_block_list.text: What? Did you only start packing this morning?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Haha... Well, what happened was...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Shouldn't you be leaving around now?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's right. I'm off, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Erm... Where's your luggage?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I gave my bags to Tazuna yesterday. She said
she'd send them to the hotel.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
No, no! I mean the stuff you're taking with you
today! Don't you need a change of clothes and
toiletries?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Like I said, they've already been sent to the
hotel.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hold on. You know it takes longer than a day for
your stuff to get to France, right?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It does?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But our bags are always waiting for us at the hotel
when I travel with my family.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's probably because your family staff brought
it all as carry-on luggage or sent it in advance,
and you just never knew!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I can't take it anymore! Come on! I'll help
you pack!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! Oh dear, where did I put my large
suitcase again?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I'll ask your trainer to handle the check-in
process ahead of time and make sure you can
board with carry-on luggage!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So that's what happened. I was worried about Dia
doing everything on her own, so I also came to
see her off.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I made it in time thanks to Kita and Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Dia's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Kita, I'm sorry for all nonsense Dia puts you
through... Thank you for always being there for
her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Of course! It's no problem! They don't call me the
clutch captain for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But I won't be able to help her after today... Ah,
I'm getting really nervous all of a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're such a worrywart, Kita! I'll be fine on my
own!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Make sure you take good care of her!

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for any trouble Dia causes. She still has a
lot to learn about the world...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Not you too, Father! I said I'll be fine...

text_block_list.name: Dia's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You're not worried about a thing, are you? It
must be because you have someone as reliable as
your trainer by your side.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Yes, precisely. Trainer has never led me
astray!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm not worried at all about the path
ahead of me either!

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
Dia is the Satono family's most precious gem,
Trainer. Please continue to guide and support her.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
Dia, we'll be cheering for you as you take on the
challenges you've chosen for yourself! Do your
very best!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Father, Mother... Thank you. I'll make history as
an illustrious runner of the Satono family.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You can expect great things from me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Satono Diamond leaves for a foreign
land, seeking to take on the challenges that lie
ahead and forge a new chapter of history.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The path she's embarking on will surely be one
that gleams in the annals of history with the
dazzling sheen of a diamond.
